name: Masha, Come On!
overview: Masha Arzamasova is a journalist and author of one of the most popular Russian—language blogs on relationships and sex education. As an experiment, Masha will go on dates with men from Moscow, Rostov-on-Don, Sochi, Yekaterinburg and Perm. None of them will know about the purpose of the meeting, and the film crew will monitor each of the dates using hidden cameras.
